pattern: Wrap expensive pure components with React.memo and compare props
anti_pattern: Memoizing every component regardless of render cost
description: Use React.memo for components that re-render frequently with same props

pattern: Cache expensive computations with useMemo and stable dependencies
anti_pattern: useMemo for trivial computations or unstable dependency arrays
description: Reserve useMemo for genuinely expensive calculations not simple lookups

pattern: Stabilize callback references with useCallback for child memo
anti_pattern: useCallback on every function regardless of whether children memo
description: Only useful when passed to memoized children or used in effect deps

pattern: Use keyExtractor getItemLayout and windowSize for FlatList tuning
anti_pattern: Rendering all items without virtualization; inline renderItem
description: Properly configured FlatList with extracted components and stable keys

pattern: Replace FlatList with FlashList for recycling-based list rendering
anti_pattern: Keeping FlatList for very large lists with complex items
description: FlashList from Shopify provides recycling architecture for better perf

pattern: Use react-native-fast-image for caching and priority image loading
anti_pattern: Default Image component for lists; no placeholder or cache strategy
description: FastImage provides aggressive caching resizing and priority loading

pattern: Lazy load screens and use native stack navigator for performance
anti_pattern: Importing all screens eagerly; JS-based stack navigator
description: Use @react-navigation/native-stack and React.lazy for screen components

pattern: Run animations on UI thread with react-native-reanimated worklets
anti_pattern: Animated API for complex animations running on JS thread
description: Reanimated worklets execute on UI thread for smooth 60fps animation

pattern: Use react-native-gesture-handler for native-driven gesture recognition
anti_pattern: PanResponder for complex gestures; JS-driven gesture processing
description: Native gesture handling avoids JS thread bottleneck for smooth interaction

pattern: Use Zustand or Jotai for lightweight state; Redux for complex flows
anti_pattern: Single global store for everything; Context for frequently changing state
description: Match state tool to complexity: local state > Zustand > Redux Toolkit

pattern: Use named imports and tree-shaking; lazy load feature modules
anti_pattern: Import entire libraries (import _ from lodash); no code splitting
description: Named imports enable tree-shaking; dynamic imports reduce initial bundle

pattern: Enable Hermes for faster startup and reduced memory on Android
anti_pattern: V8/JSC on Android without bytecode precompilation
description: Hermes precompiles to bytecode for faster TTI and lower memory usage

pattern: Use StyleSheet.create for style deduplication and validation
anti_pattern: Inline style objects in render creating new references each render
description: StyleSheet.create deduplicates and validates styles at creation time

pattern: Extract renderItem and complex JSX into separate pure components
anti_pattern: Inline arrow functions in renderItem FlatList and map callbacks
description: Extracted components prevent parent re-renders from recreating closures

pattern: Always return cleanup function from useEffect for subscriptions
anti_pattern: Missing cleanup causing memory leaks and state updates after unmount
description: Clean up event listeners timers and subscriptions in effect return

keywords: key prop list unique stable identifier
pattern: Use stable unique IDs as keys not array index
anti_pattern: Array index as key causing state bugs on reorder/filter/insert
description: Stable keys let React correctly track identity across re-renders

pattern: Debounce search input with 300ms delay before API calls
anti_pattern: Firing API request on every keystroke flooding the server
description: Debounced input reduces API calls and prevents UI jank during typing

pattern: Wrap feature sections with error boundaries for graceful degradation
anti_pattern: No error boundaries letting one component crash entire app
description: Error boundaries prevent cascading crashes and show recovery UI

pattern: Use Suspense boundaries with fallback UI for lazy-loaded content
anti_pattern: No Suspense fallback causing blank screens during lazy load
description: Suspense provides declarative loading states for async components

pattern: Use Platform.select and .ios.js/.android.js for platform code
anti_pattern: Single implementation ignoring platform conventions and capabilities
description: Platform-specific files and Platform.select for adaptive behavior
